admin_forgot_password_hint: Clear the password_hash value in settings.json to reset.
hint_demo_login: Log in with the password to enable saving and all features.
label_raw_html: Raw HTML (disable Markdown — use for complex HTML layouts)
label_scope_css: Scope CSS (Prevent leaking to other parts)
use_wrapper_hint: Use for components that define the overall page layout. Include {{CONTENT}} to specify where the page body will be inserted.
page_id_hint: The ID used for the page URL. Alphanumeric characters and hyphens allowed.
component_id_hint: Identification for the component. Alphanumeric characters and underscores allowed.
category_select_hint: Category options can be set in "Design" -> "Site Settings: Category".
use_scope_hint: Recommended to be ON. Prevents CSS from affecting other parts of the site.
sett_password_hint: (Fill only if you want to change)
sett_cat_hint: Category options can be set in "Design" menu -> "Site Settings: Category".
nav_links_cards_hint: NAV_LINKS and NAV_CARDS show all pages if category is 'all', or pages without a category if left empty. Order follows page sort order. Pages with sort order below 0 are hidden.
backup_hint: Download all site data (JSON) and uploaded media files (jpg, svg, etc.) as a ZIP file. Regular backups are recommended.
memo_hint: Feel free to enter notes or reminders here.
ai_prompt_hint: You can save and copy 'instructions' that serve as the base for the AI to correctly understand mikanBox's specifications when requesting page creation.
ai_prompt_placeholder: Example: Please always speak politely. I prefer modern CSS practices.
hint_media_display: Display: In Markdown, you can use the filename directly. For HTML, specify the URL like images/filename.
hint_media_resize: Resize: Click 'Resize...', enter either Width (W) or Height (H), and it will be resized while maintaining the aspect ratio.
msg_prompt_copied: AI prompt copied to clipboard! Paste it into your AI assistant to provide instructions.
prompt_expert_intro: You are an expert in %s. Please understand the site structure below and follow my instructions to modify code or create components.
mcp_key_hint: API key for connecting AI tools like Claude via MCP. Copy this key into your Claude Desktop settings.
err_password_chars: Password must be at least 4 characters.
err_csrf: Invalid CSRF token. Please try again.
err_resize_failed: Error: Resize failed (GD not supported or invalid file).
hint_setup_msg: Please set a password for the admin panel.
hint_slug_index: index (Top page) ID cannot be changed.
hint_confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this?
md_span_class_c: Apply class to inline text (part of sentence)
md_span_class_i: Apply ID to inline text (part of sentence)
md_html_mix: Markdown and HTML can be mixed. Lines starting with HTML tags are treated as HTML code. Blank lines around HTML tags are optional.
sett_cat_readonly_hint: Categories are freely set on each page. Currently used categories are shown here automatically.
ssg_hint: Exports the site as HTML files. Can be published as a fast and secure static site.
hint_auto_composition: Full URL used when building statically. Auto-composed if not specified.
hint_is_new: "new" if within N days, else empty
hint_db_api: All content inside DATAROW blocks is hidden on the page. Set page status to 'DB' to publish as a JSON API.
md_space_required: Headings, lists, and numbered lists require a space after the symbol (half- or full-width). Blockquotes (>) do not.
csv_hint: Converts CSV data into a database format usable within your site. The first row is used as field names — use alphanumeric characters only (case-sensitive). Copy the result and paste it into the page body.
msg_demo_mode: Saving is disabled in demo mode.
md_html_mix_short: Markdown and HTML can be mixed.
md_html_block_intro: Lines starting with the following HTML tags are treated as HTML code.
md_html_block_note: Both opening and closing tags (e.g. </div>) apply. Lines starting with these skip Markdown processing and are output as-is.
md_list_space_note: A space after the symbol is required for the above.
md_quote_space_note: A space after the symbol is optional.
md_table_row2_required: The second row (separator) is required for table formatting.
hint_datarow_self_table: Display table-format data from current page
hint_datarow_page_table: Display table-format data from page ID
hint_datarow_ext_table: Display table-format data from external source
hint_db_api_hidden: Content inside DATAROW blocks is hidden on the page.
hint_db_api_public: Set page status to 'DB' to publish as a JSON API.
hint_data_ascii_rule: key and rowID must be alphanumeric + underscore only. Values can be any text.
